zh.lifeSummary: 當William Hancock I於1580年9月4日出生在英國英格蘭戴文普萊姆斯時，他的父親Thomas Hancock II30歲，母親Agnes Webb Nickolls27歲。他於1605年9月26日與Susanna Susan Poynter在英國米德萊可斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1607年住在宏都拉斯萊皮拉弗吉尼亞。他去世於1622年3月22日在美國維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪貝克萊享年41歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾波爾頓 勒 費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Hancock I于1580年9月4日出生在英国英格兰戴文普萊姆斯时，他的父亲Thomas Hancock II30岁，母亲Agnes Webb Nickolls27岁。他于1605年9月26日与Susanna Susan Poynter在英国米德萊可斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1607年住在洪都拉斯萊皮拉弗吉尼亞。他去世于1622年3月22日在美国弗吉尼亚州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪貝克萊享年41岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾波爾頓 勒 費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Hancock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hann + the hypocoristic suffix -cok, which was commonly added to personal names (see Cocke ).
Dutch: from Middle Dutch hanecoc ‘winkle, periwinkle’ (a type of shellfish), probably a metonymic occupational name for someone who gathered and sold shellfish.

History: Thomas Hancock, the uncle of Declaration of Independence signatory John Hancock (1736/7–93), was among the foremost of 18th-century American businessmen. He was a descendant of Nathaniel Hancock, who was known to have been in Cambridge, MA, as early as 1634. Born in Braintree, MA, John Hancock was president of the Second Continental Congress and the first governor of the state of MA.

variants.name: Hancox
meanings: English: variant of Hancock , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Handcock
meanings: English: variant of Hancock with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Hann
meanings: German and Dutch: from a shortened pet form of the personal name Johann (see John ).

English: from the Middle English personal name Hann, commonly a pet form of Henry (Middle English Hanry). Hann could also be a rhyming pet form of Randolph (Middle English Randal, shortened to Ran or Rand). Han was also a pet form of Joh(a)n in Middle Dutch, and it is possible that this usage was brought to England by Flemings after the Norman Conquest, but no evidence has yet been found that it was similarly used in Middle English. See Henry and Randall , and compare Hankin , Hancock , and Hanks .
English: variant of Ann with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When William Hancock I was born on 4 September 1580, in Plymouth, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Hancock II, was 30 and his mother, Agnes Webb Nickolls, was 27. He married Susanna Susan Poynter on 26 September 1605, in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Virginia, Lempira, Honduras in 1607. He died on 22 March 1622, in Berkeley, Charles City County, Virginia, United States, at the age of 41, and was buried in Poulton le Fylde, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Hancock I est né le 4 septembre 1580, à Plymouth, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Hancock II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes Webb Nickolls, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Susanna Susan Poynter le 26 septembre 1605, à Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Virginia, Lempira, Honduras en 1607. Il est décédé le 22 mars 1622, à Berkeley, Charles City County, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Poulton le Fylde, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Hancock I am 4. September 1580 in Plymouth, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Hancock II 30 und seine Mutter Agnes Webb Nickolls 27. Er hat am 26. September 1605 in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England Susanna Susan Poynter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1607 hat er in Virginia, Lempira, Honduras gelebt. Er starb am 22. März 1622 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Berkeley, Charles City County, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Poulton le Fylde, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Hancock I è nato il il 4 settembre 1580 nel Plymouth, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Hancock II, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Webb Nickolls, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Susanna Susan Poynter il 26 settembre 1605, nel Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Virginia, Lempira, Honduras nel 1607. Morì il 22 marzo 1622, nel Berkeley, Charles City County, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Poulton le Fylde, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Hancock Iが1580年9月4日にイギリスイギリスデボンプリモウスで生まれた時，父Thomas Hancock IIは30歳，母Agnes Webb Nickollsは27歳であった。1605年9月26日にイギリスミッドレセックスステプニーサイント ダンスタン アンド アル サインツ チャーチでSusanna Susan Poynterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1607年にはホンジュラスレンピラバージニアに住んでいた。彼は1622年3月22日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州チャーレス シトイ コウントイバーケリーで41歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアポウルトン ル フイルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Berkeley, Charles City County, Virginia,: 미국 버지니아 주 찰스 시티 카운티 버켈리
ko.St Dunstan, Stepney, Middlesex, England: 영국 미들레세스 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: William Hancock I(이)가 1580년 9월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 플림우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Hancock II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Webb Nickolls(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1605년 9월 26일 영국 미들레세스 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치에서 Susanna Susan Poynter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1607년도에 온두라스 레피라 버지니아에서 살았다. 그는 1622년 3월 22일 미국 버지니아 주 찰스 시티 카운티 버켈리에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 파우턴 일 피드에 묻혔다.

pt.4 September 1580–22 Mar 1622 (Killed by: 4 de setembro de 1580–22 de março de 1622
pt.Berkeley, Charles City County, Virginia,: Berkeley, Charles City County, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América
pt.St Dunstan, Stepney, Middlesex, England: Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.Norfolk, Virginia, United States: Norfolk, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Hancock I nasceu em 4 de setembro de 1580, em Plymouth, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Hancock II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Webb Nickolls, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Susanna Susan Poynter em 26 de setembro de 1605, em Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Virginia, Lempira, Honduras em 1607. Ele faleceu em 22 de março de 1622, em Berkeley, Charles City County, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Poulton le Fylde, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.Berkeley, Charles City County, Virginia,: биркели, чарльс сити коунти, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты
ru.St Dunstan, Stepney, Middlesex, England: сеинт дунстань анд алл сеинц чурч, степни, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Hancock I родился 4 сентября 1580 г. в местности плимоут, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Hancock II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Webb Nickolls, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanna Susan Poynter 26 сентября 1605 г. в местности сеинт дунстань анд алл сеинц чурч, степни, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности виргиня, лемпира, Гондурас в 1607 году. Он умер 22 марта 1622 г. в местности биркели, чарльс сити коунти, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности поултон л филд, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Hancock I nació el 4 de septiembre de 1580, en Plymouth, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Hancock II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes Webb Nickolls, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Susanna Susan Poynter el 26 de septiembre de 1605, en Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Virginia, Lempira, Honduras en 1607. Murió el 22 de marzo de 1622, en Berkeley, Charles City County, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Poulton le Fylde, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
